meta.question: In "Dynamic Power Analaysis", open the "05 Simulation Configuraitons" package and list participating configurations.
meta.finalAnswer:
No matching data found for the package path “Dynamic Power Analaysis” → “05 Simulation Configuraitons”, so I couldn’t list the participating simulation configurations from the RDF model.

What I did find: there is a package named “Dynamic Power Analysis” in the model, but I could not locate a directly contained subpackage whose name matches “05 Simulation Configuraitons” (even with spelling/substring variants), nor any contained elements that looked like configuration/simulation artifacts under that package subtree.

Next query will list contained NamedElement names within the dynamic power analysis package that look like configuration/simulation, then return them as configurations.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?conf ?confName WHERE {
  VALUES ?rootPkg {
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/package/TMT::Project::Work%2520Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment%2520and%2520Phasing%2520System::Systems%2520Engineering::10%2520Analysis::Roll-up%2520Analyses::Dynamic%2520Power%2520Analysis>
  }
  ?rootPkg (vocab:Element_ownedElement|vocab:Package_packagedElement)+ ?conf .
  ?conf vocab:NamedElement_name ?confName .
  FILTER(
    CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?confName)), LCASE("config")) ||
    CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?confName)), LCASE("configuration")) ||
    CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?confName)), LCASE("simulation")) ||
    CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?confName)), LCASE("sim"))
  )
}
LIMIT 25

request.message: No named elements inside the Dynamic Power Analysis package contained substrings like "config", "configuration", "simulation", or "sim". This is unexpected and indicates either a different naming convention, or that the relevant configurations are not represented as NamedElement_name in this package subtree. I will search for all immediate contained NamedElements under the Dynamic Power Analysis package and then look for any that are of type "simulation%20configuration" or similar by rdf:type.
request.reason: Previous filters may have been too literal on names. The right approach is to find elements by type first (e.g., rdf:type vocab:simulation%20configuration) and then list their names regardless of substring matches.

request.message: Despite locating the "Dynamic Power Analysis" package, attempts to find the "05 Simulation Configuraitons" subpackage and any configuration-like participating elements via both name-based and type-based searches returned no matches. This likely indicates the requested package/subpackage naming is different in the graph, or configurations are modeled outside that subtree in a way not captured by the available predicates (e.g., no rdf:type or NamedElement_name in that location).
